message:
test(ext-conformance): add E2E smoke runtime suite with verbose JSONL logging (bd-2ni)

Enhance scenario runner with per-event structured logs (pi.ext.smoke.v1
schema) containing correlation IDs (run_id, extension_id, scenario_id),
source/runtime tier metadata, and captured tool/command/event outputs.

Adds per-extension JSONL log files, a triage report with per-extension
summaries, and a `smoke_runtime_suite` test as the main E2E entry point.
8 pass, 0 fail, 15 skip across 16 extensions and 23 scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
